Welcome to Our Hotel

A Sanctuary in the Holy City

Where Devotion Meets Modern Comfort

Hotel Radha Krishna Palace stands as a warm and welcoming retreat in the spiritual heart of Mathura — the sacred birthplace of Lord Krishna. Our property is designed to offer pilgrims, families, and travellers a peaceful and comfortable stay infused with divine ambiance.

Conveniently located in Chandrapuri on the Thana Highway, directly opposite Jyoti Hospital, our hotel is easily accessible from all major temples, ghats, and attractions of Mathura and Vrindavan.

From air-conditioned rooms and a grand banquet hall to lush garden lawns and free parking, Hotel Radha Krishna Palace provides everything you need for a memorable stay in this holy city.

Events & Functions

Grand Banquet & Lawn

Celebrate Every Occasion in Grand Style

Hotel Radha Krishna Palace offers a magnificent banquet hall and an expansive garden lawn — the ideal venue for weddings, receptions, birthday celebrations, religious functions, and corporate gatherings in Mathura.

Our beautifully decorated hall features a raised stage, elegant chandeliers, polished marble floors, and tasteful red accent arches. The outdoor lawn provides a lush, open-air setting with metal lighting structures for evening events.

  • Large indoor hall with raised stage
  • Outdoor garden lawn
  • Elegant chandeliers & décor
  • Decorative red-white arched interiors
  • Weddings & receptions
  • Religious & cultural ceremonies
  • Birthday & anniversary events
  • Ample parking for guests

Hotel Information

Timings & Hotel Rules

🕐 Check-in & Check-out

Check-In 10:00 AM – 11:00 PM
Check-Out 8:00 AM – 10:00 AM
Early Check-In Subject to availability
Late Check-Out Extra charge applies
Reception 24 Hours Open

Room Tariff

₹1,275 / night

Per room · Includes AC + Private Bath + Parking

📋 Hotel Rules & Policies

🪪Valid government-issued ID proof mandatory at check-in (Aadhaar / Passport / Voter ID / Driving Licence)
🚭Smoking is strictly not allowed inside rooms or corridors
🍶Alcohol consumption is not permitted on the premises
🤫Please maintain silence after 10:00 PM — respect fellow guests
🐾Pets are not allowed inside the hotel premises
👥Visitors are not permitted inside rooms — they may meet guests in the lobby only
🔒The hotel is not responsible for loss of valuables — please use room locks
🧹Guests are requested to keep rooms clean and report any damage immediately
